prestazioni: RB26DETT engine: Full forged internals with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 2.8L stroker crankshaft for a 2.8L displacement, paired with Tomei 272° camshafts and Tomei adjustable cam gears for optimized valve timing

Turbocharger upgrade: Garrett GTX4202R with a custom 0.86 A/R turbine housing and 60mm billet compressor wheel, paired with a Tomei M82 cast manifold and HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve for precise boost control up to 2.0 bar (29 psi)

Fuel system: Nismo 550cc injectors upgraded to ID1000s with an Aeromotive 340 Stealth fuel pump, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and a Tomei fuel pressure regulator, controlled by a Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder tuning
estetica: Body kit: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a one-off carbon fiber hood featuring a functional RB26DETT heat extractor vent

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom valving for the R33 chassis, paired with Cusco pillowball upper mounts and Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) for precise handling adjustments

Wheels and brakes: Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 front and 18x11.5 +25 rear wheels with Toyo R888R 275/35/18 and 305/30/18 tires, paired with Endless 6-pot front and 4-pot rear brake calipers with 356mm and 330mm two-piece rotors, respectively
